title: Make the PERFECT Videos with Claude Code (Full Workflow)
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates an AI video generation workflow using Claude Code to automate the entire production pipeline from concept or URL to finished video, including planning, code generation, voice synthesis, visual generation, and music selection. The system uses Archon as the workflow engine and HyperFrames as the video generation framework.
